treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 7L IV fluids, multiple doses of IV Zofran, IV Ativan 1mg, Haldol 2.5mg IV, Lisinopril 40mg x2, SQ insulin 17 units
treatment_information.treatment_response: Nausea and vomiting resolved, patient felt dehydrated but denied additional symptoms.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to the ED with nausea and vomiting.
Patient received about 7L IV fluids and multiple doses of medications for nausea.
Patient denied pain, nausea or vomiting upon arrival to the floor.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Recommended follow-up appointment with PCP in the next few weeks.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Encouraged to abstain from marijuana to reduce the risk of future episodes.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient advised to abstain from marijuana products due to potential causes for symptoms.
